_meta.metric: Migration across each Bundesland's border (Zuzüge = in-migration, Fortzüge = out-migration, saldo = net). Counts moves that cross the STATE border, from other German states AND from abroad. It is NOT purely intra-state city-to-city churn — Destatis does not publish per-state intra-state moves cleanly, and within-city moves are not registered as Wanderungen at all.
_meta.source: Destatis / Statistische Ämter des Bundes und der Länder — GENESIS 12711, 'Wanderungen über die Grenzen der Bundesländer'

national_totals.note: national Zuzüge include international immigration (2022 was a high-immigration year)

intra_state_context.note: ~2.8M people/yr change residence across district (Kreis) boundaries in Germany; the MAJORITY of these internal moves stay within the same Bundesland (only ~1.0M/yr cross a state border). This is Arrivio's domestic relocation demand. Destatis does not publish the intra-state total per Bundesland, so use this as a NATIONAL context figure alongside the per-state net-migration shading below.
